description:
Migrate helixir's npm release pipeline from semantic-release to @changesets/cli + changesets/action@v1. This is the standard release model for all Booked Solid open source projects.

## Why

The current semantic-release pipeline fails on every run because @semantic-release/git tries to push a version bump commit directly to main, which branch protection blocks (GH006: requires PR + 7 status checks). changesets/action@v1 solves this by creating a PR for the version bump instead of pushing directly — no branch protection conflict.

## What to do

### 1. Install @changesets/cli
```
pnpm add -D @changesets/cli
```

### 2. Create .changeset/config.json
helixir is a SINGLE package (not a monorepo), so no linked array needed:
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://unpkg.com/@changesets/config@3.1.2/schema.json",
  "changelog": "@changesets/cli/changelog",
  "commit": false,
  "fixed": [],
  "linked": [],
  "access": "public",
  "baseBranch": "main",
  "updateInternalDependencies": "patch",
  "ignore": []
}
```

### 3. Create .changeset/README.md
Standard changeset README explaining the workflow.

### 4. Replace .github/workflows/release.yml with .github/workflows/publish.yml
Delete release.yml entirely. Create publish.yml:
```yaml
name: Publish

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

permissions:
  contents: write
  pull-requests: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  publish:
    name: Publish to npm
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: '>=9'

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Build
        run: pnpm run build

      - name: Version and Publish
        uses: changesets/action@v1
        with:
          publish: pnpm run changeset:publish
          version: pnpm run changeset:version
          commit: 'chore: version packages'
          title: 'chore: version packages'
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
          NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE: 'true'
          HUSKY: '0'
```

Note: HUSKY: '0' prevents the pre-push hook from running during CI git operations.

### 5. Update package.json scripts
Add:
```json
"changeset": "changeset",
"changeset:version": "changeset version",
"changeset:publish": "changeset publish"
```

Remove: "release" and "release:dry-run"

Fix prepublishOnly to only build (no tests, tests run in CI):
```json
"prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build"
```

### 6. Remove semantic-release from devDependencies
Remove from package.json devDependencies and run pnpm install:
- semantic-release
- @semantic-release/changelog
- @semantic-release/commit-analyzer
- @semantic-release/git
- @semantic-release/github
- @semantic-release/npm
- @semantic-release/release-notes-generator
- conventional-changelog-conventionalcommits

### 7. Delete .releaserc.json

### 8. Create an initial changeset for pending unreleased work
Create .changeset/initial-migration.md:
```markdown
---
"helixir": minor
---

Migrate release pipeline to changesets; add Zod schema validation for design token files; various tool improvements and bug fixes since v0.1.0.
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] .changeset/config.json exists with correct single-package config
- [ ] .github/workflows/publish.yml exists using changesets/action@v1
- [ ] .github/workflows/release.yml is deleted
- [ ] .releaserc.json is deleted
- [ ] package.json has changeset, changeset:version, changeset:publish scripts
- [ ] All @semantic-release/* packages removed from devDependencies
- [ ] pnpm-lock.yaml updated
- [ ] At least one .changeset/*.md file exists for pending unreleased work
- [ ] CI passes on the PR
